title: Create immutable plan drafts
description: Create attributable immutable Draft Budget Plan Revisions from complete explicit category entries without changing active intent. Implements G1, G2, G3, and G5 through UC-BUDGET-001.
rationale: The owner needs inspectable proposed intent before any plan governs a Budget Position.
story_want: create or revise a complete monthly category plan as a draft
story_so_that: planned intent can be checked before activation without rewriting history
acceptance_criteria: Given a current or future Budget Period and a complete valid draft request, when Create Draft succeeds, then one new immutable Draft Budget Plan Revision with a stable revision identifier is returned and the active revision is unchanged.

Given exact non-negative ZAR Category Budget Entries, when a draft is created, then every submitted category identifier and amount round-trips exactly and the draft total equals their exact base-10 sum.
Given a ZAR 0.00 Category Budget Entry, when the draft is read, then that category is returned as explicit Zero Budget.
Given an active Spend Category omitted from the request, when the draft is read, then no entry is invented and the category remains Unbudgeted.
Given an empty entry collection, when a draft is created, then an explicit empty draft is returned and remains distinct from No Budget Plan and an all-Zero Budget draft.

Given an existing Draft, Active, or Superseded revision and newly submitted complete content, when the owner revises the plan, then a new Draft revision is created and the source revision remains unchanged.
Given a negative amount, duplicate category identifier, malformed amount, or incomplete request, when Create Draft is invoked, then validation fails before any plan mutation.
Given an unknown, inactive, archived, or stale Spend Category reference, when Create Draft is invoked, then the entire request fails before any revision is created.
Given a successful draft creation, when its provenance is read, then owner context, reason, creation timestamp, period identity, currency, and category-contract version are present.
Given a completed Closed Budget Period, when Create Draft is requested, then BUDGET returns a stable closed-period error and creates no plan or revision.
Given Create Draft omits actor context or a non-blank owner reason, when validation runs, then BUDGET rejects the request before creating a plan or revision.
security_criteria: Draft creation requires the trusted owner identity or explicitly delegated Agent Host context; financial payloads may appear only in the structured data result.
